description: Drives the context-bundle exporter's projection. The build/BFS gathers a generous neighbourhood; this file decides what gets emitted, in what order, and which predicates are surfaced vs. suppressed. Curation lives here, not in the traversal.

sections.title: Contested claims (present as live tensions, not settled)

editorialFlags.unbackedClaim: Claim in scope with no supports/pressureTests evidence edge — needs source backing.
editorialFlags.contestedClaim: Claim with both supporting and pressure-testing sources — keep it live.
editorialFlags.skeletonCenter: Center document is still a skeleton/not-started — bundle is thin by design.
